title: tetrorchidium minus
intro: Tetrorchidium minus, also known as the minus tree or minus plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Tetrorchidium minus include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in decoctions or infusions, and it can also be dried and processed into a powder for later use.
